archetype_reasoning: New LEGENDARY qualifier discovered 2026-07-13. geo_elo_active=2286.8 (above 2175 LEGENDARY threshold), geo_accuracy_pool=1, research_excluded=0, bot_type=NULL. Full trade history: 1,907 total all-category resolved trades, 1,469 with clear data. Geopolitics: 736 trades, 396 wins (54%), 369 contested (50% contested rate). Unknown category: 710 trades (mix of Russia/UKR battlefield and other markets). Elections: 23 trades (13 wins). Dominant pattern: massive repetition per market in Russia/UKR city capture markets — 48 trades on Rodynske, 44 on Siversk, 42 on Udachne, 41 on Kupiansk, 39 on Kostyantynivka Aug. Average prices 0.75-0.88 (upper edge of contested range, trending near-certainty). Net directionality=0.968 (nearly always on one side per market). Overall Russia/UKR accuracy: ~50% on 500+ trades — near-chance, not significant edge. Near-certainty (>=0.90) geo/elections accuracy: 45% (81/182 wins) — BELOW 50%, unusual and suggests these are NOT simple yield harvesting wins. Contested (0.10-0.80) accuracy: 54% (206/382) — z-score ~1.5, not statistically significant at 95% confidence. Also trades 'Trump says X' Elections markets with contradictory YES/NO positions. PNL=-$711 (small negative). Archetype VOLUME_SPECIALIST: high volume per market in Russia/UKR battlefield, but accuracy near-random, no demonstrated systematic edge. NOT GENUINE_FORECASTER (no diversity, near-random accuracy). NOT DOMAIN_SPECIALIST (accuracy not above chance threshold). NOT YIELD_HARVESTER (many trades at genuinely contested prices). Confidence LOW given thin meaningful evidence of edge and data integrity caveat (stored geo_trades=119 vs actual Geopolitics-category trades=736).
domain_strengths: Russia_UKR (tentative): 736+ geopolitics trades, largely battlefield capture questions. Best individual markets: Rodynske 77% on 48 trades, Siversk 70% on 44 trades. However, overall Russia/UKR accuracy near-random (~50%).
domain_blindspots: Russia_UKR (battlefield): Overall accuracy ~50% on 500+ trades — near-chance, not statistically significant edge
Elections (Trump says X): contradictory YES/NO positions on same outcomes — near-certainty NO harvesting alongside contested YES bets, both losing and winning inconsistently
Accuracy on near-certainty bets (>=0.90): 45% — below 50%, unusual loss pattern on near-certain entries
domain_summary: Almost entirely focused on Russia/UKR military advance markets ('Will Russia capture [city] by [date]?') with high repetition per market (40-48 orders on single markets) and near-random overall accuracy (~50%). Some individual markets show strong accuracy (Rodynske 77%), but others are very weak (Kupiansk by Oct 31: 20% on 41 trades). No demonstrated statistical edge across the domain. Directionality 0.968 indicates consistent thesis (Russia doesn't capture = NO) but the results are mixed. Data integrity caveat: geo_resolved_trades_count in traders table shows 119, but Geopolitics-category actual resolved trades = 736. Discrepancy consistent with pipeline bug seen in other traders.
signal_weight_reasoning: New qualifier. Archetype confidence LOW. Accuracy near-random on largest domain (Russia/UKR). PNL slightly negative. geo_elo_active=2286.8 is 112 points above LEGENDARY floor — some buffer. Setting MINIMAL (most conservative above EXCLUDE) pending human review. NOT STR-003 eligible this cycle per Rule: 'Never include a newly qualified trader in STR-003 signal suggestions in the same report that introduces them.'

Near-certainty accuracy 45% (81/182) — below 50%, unusual for a trader who presumably buys the near-certain side
Contradictory Elections positions: NO at 0.97+ on 'Trump says Uranium' AND YES at 0.43-0.73 on same market — bifurcated strategy
geo_resolved_trades_count discrepancy: 119 stored vs 736+ actual Geopolitics-category trades. Same pipeline bug as seen in other traders.
PNL=-$711 despite high geo_elo_active=2286.8 — ELO may be inflated by volume rather than accuracy
High directionality (0.968): consistently bets against Russian city captures (NO side), but loses ~50% of the time on individual markets
risk_patterns: Near-random accuracy (~50%) across 500+ Russia/UKR trades means ELO is likely built on volume, not skill
Several individual markets show very low accuracy (Kupiansk Oct 31: 20% on 41 trades, Kostyantynivka Jun 30: 28% on 29 trades) — heavy losses possible on concentrated positions
PNL negative: sustained exposure to Russia city capture NOs at 0.75+ with mixed results
geo_elo_active 2286.8 — only 112 points above LEGENDARY floor; continued poor accuracy could push below 2175 within weeks

notable_calls.market: Will Russia capture Rodynske by October 31?
notable_calls.significance: Best individual market performance: 48 trades, 77% accuracy at avg 0.812. Russia did not capture Rodynske. Strongest evidence of Russia_UKR edge but single-market result.

notable_calls.market: Will Russia capture Kupiansk by October 31?
notable_calls.significance: Worst individual market: 41 trades, 20% accuracy at avg 0.615 — lost 80% of bets. Russia captured Kupiansk. Heavy losses. Illustrates the volatility of city-capture markets.

notable_calls.market: Will Russia capture Kostyantynivka by June 30?
notable_calls.significance: 29 trades, 28% accuracy — another major loss market. Consistent with near-random overall accuracy.
